recommendations.title: Stretch your buffer to cover a longer thin period
recommendations.body: Your recent income has been declining. With about 3.2 months of coverage already, the action is preserving runway, not growing it.
recommendations.next_move: Trim discretionary by $125/month and direct it to liquid savings.

recommendations.reason: Your personalised plan: Months 1–6: Redirect $720/month to retirement savings
At your age the target for your age is roughly $86,400; you're about 79% behind. Consistent contributions today compound into the next decade.
Life coverage is one of five resilience milestones; term policies are inexpensive at younger ages.

recommendations.action: Add disability insurance to your benefits
recommendations.reason: Disability is a top cause of unplanned income loss; check whether your employer offers it.
